localAggregateMetrics.zeroPlannerTokenInterpretation: Failed or short-circuited rows; not evidence of zero-token planning.

deepPlanningTokenAccountingCheck.purpose: Runner validation only; not a broad benchmark or public savings claim.

cloudWatchCrossCheck.publicDisclosure: Do not expose log group names, environment labels, account details, S3 paths, or trace identifiers in public copy.

supported: Pack has a real 100-case benchmark corpus and local run artifact with token and cost accounting.
The Qwen DeepPlanning travel benchmark runner can now emit nonzero token accounting in full-planner mode.
The current benchmark covers private context, calendar grounding, email grounding, group travel, public events, flights, hotels, red-herring avoidance, and preference handling.
The local aggregate planner field records 21,920,541 planner tokens, while broader AI-call logs for the same planning window record 25,204,798 total tokens.
Published DeepPlanning materials provide interaction-turn and tool-call cost proxies, but not token totals.
notSupportedYet: A public claim that Pack uses X% fewer tokens than competitors.
A public claim that Pack uses X% less energy than competitors.
Any claim that failed or short-circuited zero-token case rows prove zero-token planning.
Any energy estimate without a same-corpus baseline and a clear model/provider methodology.
A precise Pack-vs-competitor token percentage inferred only from published DeepPlanning turn/tool-call proxies.
claimGuidance.nextBenchmarkNeeded: Run the same 100 prompts through a chat-only baseline and Pack structured planning with full AI-call token accounting, then compare tokens, estimated model cost, retries, latency, and score.

deepPlanningRawQueryBaseline.purpose: Cheap single-call raw-query anchor for estimating lower bounds; not a competitor agent run.

sources.title: DeepPlanning: Benchmarking Long-Horizon Agentic Planning with Verifiable Constraints

deepPlanningPublishedCostProxies.note: Paper reports tool calls and interaction turns, not token totals.

deepPlanningTokenEstimateLowerBounds.method: Multiply the 966-token raw no-tools case-22 call by published/illustrative interaction-turn counts. This excludes tool schemas, accumulated history, tool outputs, retries, conversion, and hidden reasoning tokens.
deepPlanningTokenEstimateLowerBounds.conclusion: Pack measured 31,144 tokens on case 22 full-planner mode. Published DeepPlanning agent statistics suggest many interaction/tool steps, but exact competitor token totals still require a same-corpus token-instrumented run.
